name: anna-app-ai-interview-simulator
description: AI Interview Simulator Anna App with panel interviews, progress tracking, and study plans.

scripts.e2e:real: set ANNA_APP_REAL=1&& set ANNA_APP_PORT=5191&& set E2E_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=120000&& node tests/e2e-smoke.js
scripts.preflight: npm test && npm run fixture:verify && npm run validate && npm run e2e
scripts.preflight:real: npm run preflight && npm run e2e:real
